name: walking-wake
flavor_texts: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.
It resembles an illustration published in a paranormal magazine, said to be a depiction of a super-ancient Suicune.
text: Walking-wake is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a water and dragon-type Pokémon. Abilities: protosynthesis. Base stats — HP: 99, Attack: 83, Defense: 91, Sp. Atk: 125, Sp. Def: 83, Speed: 109. Evolution line: walking-wake. Lore: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal. It resembles an illustration published in a paranormal magazine, said to be a depiction of a super-ancient Suicune.
